items.title: Why Caterpillar (CAT) Outpaced the Stock Market Today
items.description: In the closing of the recent trading day, Caterpillar (CAT) stood at $471.61, denoting a +1.26% move from the preceding trading day.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Up Despite Shutdown Worries; These Stocks Fall On Trump Tariff Threat
items.description: The Dow was firm ahead of shutdown talks. President Donald Trump made a tariff threat. EA and Nvidia rose while some issues cleared entries on the stock market today.

items.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Dips With Trump On Shutdown Talks; Nvidia, EA Pop (Live Coverage)
items.description: The Dow Jones index was lower with President Trump set to meet for shutdown talks. EA, Nvidia and Tesla rallied on the stock market today.
